content.json:
# AI Gateway Billing Dashboard

Token usage, cost projections, and consumer activity from the AI Gateway APIM policies.

**Metric source**: `llm-emit-token-metric` policy → Application Insights custom metrics (namespace: `AIGateway`)

parameters.name: Consumer
parameters.label: Consumer
parameters.query:
let subscription_names = SUBSCRIPTION_LOOKUP;
customMetrics
| where name in ("Total Tokens", "Prompt Tokens", "Completion Tokens")
| extend SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions["Subscription ID"])
| lookup subscription_names on SubscriptionId
| extend Consumer = coalesce(TeamName, SubscriptionId)
| distinct Consumer
| order by Consumer asc

parameters.name: Model
parameters.label: Model
parameters.query:
customMetrics
| where name in ("Total Tokens", "Prompt Tokens", "Completion Tokens")
| extend Model = tostring(customDimensions["Model"])
| where isnotempty(Model)
| distinct Model
| order by Model asc

parameters.name: TokenType
parameters.label: Token Type
parameters.jsonData: [{"value":"Total Tokens","label":"Total Tokens"},{"value":"Prompt Tokens","label":"Prompt Tokens"},{"value":"Completion Tokens","label":"Completion Tokens"}]

content.query:
let subscription_names = SUBSCRIPTION_LOOKUP;
let model_pricing = MODEL_PRICING;
customMetrics
| where name in ("Prompt Tokens", "Completion Tokens")
| extend
    SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions["Subscription ID"]),
    Model = tostring(customDimensions["Model"]),
    TokenType = name
| lookup subscription_names on SubscriptionId
| extend Consumer = coalesce(TeamName, SubscriptionId)
| where ('*' in ({Consumer}) or Consumer in ({Consumer}))
| where ('*' in ({Model}) or Model in ({Model}))
| lookup model_pricing on Model
| extend CostPer1K = case(
    TokenType has "Prompt", coalesce(PromptPer1K, 0.002),
    TokenType has "Completion", coalesce(CompletionPer1K, 0.008),
    0.0)
| summarize Tokens = sum(value) by Consumer, Model, TokenType, bin(timestamp, 1d), CostPer1K
| extend EstimatedCost = Tokens / 1000.0 * CostPer1K
| summarize
    TotalTokens = sum(Tokens),
    TotalCost = sum(EstimatedCost)
    by Consumer, bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp desc, TotalCost desc
content.title: Daily Cost Estimate per Consumer

content.query:
let subscription_names = SUBSCRIPTION_LOOKUP;
let model_pricing = MODEL_PRICING;
customMetrics
| where name in ("Prompt Tokens", "Completion Tokens")
| extend
    SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions["Subscription ID"]),
    Model = tostring(customDimensions["Model"]),
    TokenType = name
| lookup subscription_names on SubscriptionId
| extend Consumer = coalesce(TeamName, SubscriptionId)
| where ('*' in ({Consumer}) or Consumer in ({Consumer}))
| where ('*' in ({Model}) or Model in ({Model}))
| lookup model_pricing on Model
| extend CostPer1K = case(
    TokenType has "Prompt", coalesce(PromptPer1K, 0.002),
    TokenType has "Completion", coalesce(CompletionPer1K, 0.008),
    0.0)
| summarize Tokens = sum(value) by Consumer, Model, TokenType, bin(timestamp, 1d), CostPer1K
| extend EstimatedCost = Tokens / 1000.0 * CostPer1K
| summarize TotalCost = sum(EstimatedCost) by Consumer, bin(timestamp, 1d)
| render timechart
content.title: Cost Trend Over Time (by Consumer)

content.query:
let model_pricing = MODEL_PRICING;
customMetrics
| where name in ("Prompt Tokens", "Completion Tokens")
| extend
    Model = tostring(customDimensions["Model"]),
    TokenType = name
| where ('*' in ({Model}) or Model in ({Model}))
| lookup model_pricing on Model
| extend CostPer1K = case(
    TokenType has "Prompt", coalesce(PromptPer1K, 0.002),
    TokenType has "Completion", coalesce(CompletionPer1K, 0.008),
    0.0)
| extend EstimatedCost = value / 1000.0 * CostPer1K
| summarize TotalCost = sum(EstimatedCost) by Model
| order by TotalCost desc
content.title: Cost Breakdown by Model

content.query:
let subscription_names = SUBSCRIPTION_LOOKUP;
customMetrics
| where name in ("Total Tokens", "Prompt Tokens", "Completion Tokens")
| where ('*' in ({TokenType}) or name in ({TokenType}))
| extend
    SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions["Subscription ID"]),
    Model = tostring(customDimensions["Model"])
| lookup subscription_names on SubscriptionId
| extend Consumer = coalesce(TeamName, SubscriptionId)
| where ('*' in ({Consumer}) or Consumer in ({Consumer}))
| where ('*' in ({Model}) or Model in ({Model}))
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(value) by Consumer, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Token Usage Over Time (by Consumer)

content.query:
let subscription_names = SUBSCRIPTION_LOOKUP;
customMetrics
| where name in ("Total Tokens", "Prompt Tokens", "Completion Tokens")
| where ('*' in ({TokenType}) or name in ({TokenType}))
| extend
    SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions["Subscription ID"]),
    Model = tostring(customDimensions["Model"])
| lookup subscription_names on SubscriptionId
| extend Consumer = coalesce(TeamName, SubscriptionId)
| where ('*' in ({Consumer}) or Consumer in ({Consumer}))
| where ('*' in ({Model}) or Model in ({Model}))
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(value) by Consumer
| top 10 by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Top Consumers by Token Usage

content.query:
let subscription_names = SUBSCRIPTION_LOOKUP;
customMetrics
| where name in ("Total Tokens", "Prompt Tokens", "Completion Tokens")
| where ('*' in ({TokenType}) or name in ({TokenType}))
| extend
    SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions["Subscription ID"]),
    Model = tostring(customDimensions["Model"])
| lookup subscription_names on SubscriptionId
| extend Consumer = coalesce(TeamName, SubscriptionId)
| where ('*' in ({Consumer}) or Consumer in ({Consumer}))
| where ('*' in ({Model}) or Model in ({Model}))
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(value) by Model, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Token Usage Over Time (by Model)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name in ("Total Tokens")
| extend Model = tostring(customDimensions["Model"])
| where ('*' in ({Model}) or Model in ({Model}))
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(value) by Model
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Total Token Share by Model

content.query:
let subscription_names = SUBSCRIPTION_LOOKUP;
customMetrics
| where name in ("Prompt Tokens", "Completion Tokens")
| extend
    SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions["Subscription ID"]),
    Model = tostring(customDimensions["Model"]),
    TokenType = name
| lookup subscription_names on SubscriptionId
| extend Consumer = coalesce(TeamName, SubscriptionId)
| where ('*' in ({Consumer}) or Consumer in ({Consumer}))
| where ('*' in ({Model}) or Model in ({Model}))
| summarize
    PromptTokens = sumif(value, TokenType == "Prompt Tokens"),
    CompletionTokens = sumif(value, TokenType == "Completion Tokens")
    by Consumer, Model
| extend TotalTokens = PromptTokens + CompletionTokens,
    PromptRatio = round(100.0 * PromptTokens / (PromptTokens + CompletionTokens), 1)
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Prompt vs Completion Breakdown (by Consumer & Model)

content.query:
requests
| where url has "/openai/"
| extend Model = extract(@"/deployments/([^/]+)/", 1, url)
| where ('*' in ({Model}) or Model in ({Model}))
| summarize
    AvgDuration = round(avg(duration), 0),
    P50 = round(percentile(duration, 50), 0),
    P90 = round(percentile(duration, 90), 0),
    P99 = round(percentile(duration, 99), 0),
    RequestCount = count()
    by Model
| order by RequestCount desc
content.title: Response Latency by Model (ms)

content.query:
requests
| where url has "/openai/"
| extend Model = extract(@"/deployments/([^/]+)/", 1, url)
| where ('*' in ({Model}) or Model in ({Model}))
| summarize AvgDuration = avg(duration) by Model, bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Average Response Time Over Time (by Model)

content.query:
let subscription_names = SUBSCRIPTION_LOOKUP;
requests
| where url has "/openai/"
| extend
    StatusBucket = case(
        resultCode startswith "2", "2xx Success",
        resultCode startswith "4", "4xx Client Error",
        resultCode startswith "5", "5xx Server Error",
        strcat("Other (", resultCode, ")")),
    SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions["Subscription ID"])
| lookup subscription_names on SubscriptionId
| extend Consumer = coalesce(TeamName, SubscriptionId)
| where ('*' in ({Consumer}) or Consumer in ({Consumer}))
| summarize Count = count() by StatusBucket, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Response Status Over Time

content.query:
requests
| where url has "/openai/"
| extend IsCacheHit = duration < 100
| summarize
    TotalRequests = count(),
    CacheHits = countif(IsCacheHit),
    BackendCalls = countif(not(IsCacheHit))
| extend CacheHitRate = round(100.0 * CacheHits / TotalRequests, 1)
content.title: Cache Hit Rate (Overall)

content.query:
requests
| where url has "/openai/"
| extend IsCacheHit = duration < 100
| summarize
    CacheHits = countif(IsCacheHit),
    BackendCalls = countif(not(IsCacheHit))
    by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Cache Hits vs Backend Calls Over Time

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name in ("Total Tokens", "Prompt Tokens", "Completion Tokens")
| where ('*' in ({TokenType}) or name in ({TokenType}))
| extend
    OperationId = tostring(customDimensions["Operation ID"]),
    ApiId = tostring(customDimensions["API ID"]),
    Model = tostring(customDimensions["Model"])
| where ('*' in ({Model}) or Model in ({Model}))
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(value) by ApiId, OperationId, Model
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Tokens by API Operation & Model

content.query:
let subscription_names = SUBSCRIPTION_LOOKUP;
customMetrics
| where name in ("Total Tokens", "Prompt Tokens", "Completion Tokens")
| extend
    ClientIP = tostring(customDimensions["Client IP"]),
    SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions["Subscription ID"])
| lookup subscription_names on SubscriptionId
| extend Consumer = coalesce(TeamName, SubscriptionId)
| where ('*' in ({Consumer}) or Consumer in ({Consumer}))
| summarize
    Requests = dcount(timestamp),
    TotalTokens = sum(value)
    by ClientIP, Consumer
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Usage by Client IP
